== Notes for [[Item:Q83053|Q83053]] ==

From ''Banu Makhzum'' Tribe. Head of the Kurashite settlement at Meccah. [p.11 of Mohammed and the Rise of Islam http://www.muhammadanism.org/Margoliouth/mohammed_rise_islam/mohammed_rise_islam.pdf

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hisham_ibn_al-Mughirah

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3141C976F1EFBC189822EF79916C09F3
geni:6000000001839573270

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
